Package BusinessLayer

Class NOR

java.lang.Object
BusinessLayer.Component
BusinessLayer.NOR
public class NOR extends Component
NOR gate component used in the digital logic simulator. This component has two input pins and one output pin. The output is HIGH only when both inputs are LOW (output = NOT(input1 OR input2)).

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class BusinessLayer.Component

    height, inputPins, outputPins, selected, width, x, y

  • Constructor Details

    • NOR

      public NOR(int x, int y)
      Constructs a NOR gate at the given position.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the NOR gate
      y - the y-coordinate of the NOR gate

  • Method Details

    • initializePins

      protected void initializePins()
      Initializes input and output pins of the NOR gate. Two input pins are placed on the left side and one output pin is placed on the right side after the small output circle.
      Specified by:
      initializePins in class Component

    • updatePinPositions

      protected void updatePinPositions()
      Updates the positions of all pins when the component moves.
      Specified by:
      updatePinPositions in class Component

    • compute

      public void compute()
      Computes the logical NOR of the two input pins and sets the output pin value accordingly.
      Specified by:
      compute in class Component

    • draw

      public void draw(Graphics g)
      Draws the NOR gate on the canvas. The NOR gate is represented as an OR-shaped curve with a small circle at the output, and lines for inputs and output.
      Specified by:
      draw in class Component
      Parameters:
      g - the Graphics object used for rendering

    • cloneComponent

      public Component cloneComponent()
      Creates and returns a deep copy of this NOR component.
      Specified by:
      cloneComponent in class Component
      Returns:
      a new NOR component with the same position and size
